_comment: Curation allowlist for the published RTX_PRO_6000 CUDA board. build_v2_leaderboard.py restricts candidate runs to these run_ids (see KBH_PUBLISHED_MANIFEST). To publish a new run, add its run_id here; to retire one, remove it. Runs absent from this list stay archived but unpublished (e.g. embargoed pre-release models).
